The Problem

This is costing you more
than you think.

Every day, your team loses revenue from details that slip through the cracks.

01

The forgotten follow-up

Your tech finishes a job. Forgets the unit model. Sends a ballpark estimate. The homeowner picks the contractor who got the details right.

↓ $4,800 per missed job
02

The callback loop

Office calls the customer back for missing info from the job. Customer doesn't answer. By the time they do, they've already booked someone else.

↓ 2–3 callbacks per job
03

The end-of-day scramble

Your tech tries to log 8 jobs from memory at 6 PM. Half the info is wrong. Half is missing. You quote blind.

↓ 47% details lost by EOD
04

The invisible leak

You're not sure how many jobs you're losing. No record of what was said, no way to know what slipped through.

↓ Untracked revenue loss
You don't have a lead problem.
You have a capture problem.
See the Solution →
See It In Action

From conversation to structured data
in real time.

Watch how TalkToDeal captures a live on-site conversation and extracts every critical detail — automatically.

Live Conversation
C
Hi, I need someone to look at my AC. It stopped cooling yesterday and there's a weird noise coming from the outside unit.
T
Sure, I can help. What kind of system do you have? Do you know the brand and model?
C
It's a Carrier, I think 3-ton unit. The house is about 2,200 square feet. We bought it maybe 8 years ago.
T
Okay, sounds like it could be a compressor issue or maybe a refrigerant leak. I'd want to come take a look. Are you at 742 Evergreen Terrace?
C
Yes, that's right. Can someone come tomorrow morning? And roughly how much would a full replacement cost if it comes to that?
T
For a full system replacement on a 3-ton Carrier, you're looking at around $4,800 installed. I'll get someone out there by 9 AM.
AI-Extracted Summary
Customer
742 Evergreen Terrace
Captured
Equipment
Carrier 3-ton · 8 years old
Captured
Diagnosis
Compressor / Refrigerant leak — not cooling
Captured
Estimate
$4,800 — full system replacement
Captured
Follow-up
On-site visit · Tomorrow 9 AM

How It Works

Your team already knows
how to use it.

No training. No new apps. Three steps — and the first one is just talking to the customer.

1
Step 1

Your tech talks to the customer.

Just like they always do. No app to open, no buttons to press. TalkToDeal captures the conversation in real time.

2
Step 2

AI extracts everything.

Customer name, address, equipment, job scope, urgency — pulled automatically into a structured record.

3
Step 3

Summary delivered.

Every detail captured. Ready for your next step — whether that's sending an estimate, dispatching a crew, or following up.

The Device

One device. Every detail
captured automatically.

The TalkToDeal MIC sits right where the work happens. Clip it on, start talking — AI does the rest. No app, no manual logging, no behavior change.

Use Cases

Built for the conversations
your team already has.

Residential repairs. Commercial inspections. Emergency jobs. TalkToDeal captures them all.

Residential
"Condenser coil is shot. Refrigerant low — slow leak on the TXV. Homeowner wants a full replacement."
AI captures every detail and generates a $4,800 estimate before your tech leaves the site.
Commercial
"Full inspection on a 12-unit complex. System is 18 years old. Owner comparing three bids."
AI logs the scope, flags urgency, queues the estimate — your bid goes out first.
Emergency
"Pipe burst, second floor, water through the ceiling. Need someone within the hour."
Job details instantly captured and sent to your team. Zero delay, zero miscommunication.
